_comment: Pipeline-level model registry. Architecture facts from model-profile research; drives conversion (op-family adapter, compression target) and runtime (template, MTP pairing). bf16 sizes are HF download totals; 64GB unified mem => 4-bit required for >~20GB.

gemma-4-31B-it-assistant.notes: Smallest/standard gemma4 op set. First smoke target + the EAGLE draft for gemma-4-31B-it.

gemma-4-31B-it.notes: Standard-path target. Quirks: dual RoPE, partial_rotary 0.25, per-layer head dims, logit softcap, attention_k_eq_v.

Qwythos-9B.notes: Non-standard op family: linear-attention/SSM state + conv1d. Convert text-only first. Highest per-param novelty risk.

ornith-1.0-35b.notes: Fully cached 35B Ornith source checkpoint. The generic 4-bit path exports but crashes during Core AI int4 dequant on load. The qwen35_moe_int8 config exports a complete 32 GB bundle, but live smoke on this 64 GB host exits under memory pressure. CoreAI fork commit 648ad274 adds an opt-in authored qwen3_5_moe quantization path; commit 7eafd4d extends it to shared lm_head quantization. One-layer and four-layer int4+head-quant structural bundles export and pass GPU fast-path smoke. The full authored 40-layer int4+head-quant bundle exports at 17 GB but currently fails runtime warmup with an MPS reshape error. Depth bisect showed 13 layers pass default-route generation with min_kv_capacity 1024, while single-function 14-layer decode exposed a prefill/decode shape-specialization gate. Dual-entrypoint exports route one-token decode through a dedicated Core AI function; the 14-layer probe passes two-token generation and the 16-layer probe passes eight-token repeated-decode generation without reshape/slice diagnostics. Next support step is full dual-entrypoint validation before HF publication. 397B has the same authored family but still needs full source download and much larger storage before conversion.

Qwen3.6-27B.notes: Same qwen3_5 hybrid family as Qwythos, scaled up; larger SSM footprint -> min_kv_capacity 768 (not Qwythos's 512). Do after Qwythos proves the op set.

diffusiongemma-26B-A4B-it.notes: Hardest. Convertible unit = single bidirectional forward (non-causal mask + 128-expert MoE + self-cond). Host-side Swift denoise loop: random canvas init, 48-step entropy/MI-bound accept+renoise, adaptive stop, block commit.

diffusiongemma-26B-A4B-it-HERETIC.notes: Abliterated/uncensored finetune of the google model; identical arch/config. No processor_config.json. Re-run of #5 with new weights.
